entity.name: Harsh Ankur
entity.description: I am a full-stack open source maintainer building the future of document knowledge infrastructure. Since 2019, I have architected officeParser from a simple text extractor into a comprehensive Parsing & Generation platform (v7.0.0). I am dedicated to ensuring this becomes the ultimate super-tool for all AI ingestion and document generation workflows, leveraging a seven-year track record of stability for a global community with over 10 million downloads and 300,000+ weekly installations.

projects.name: officeParser
projects.description: officeParser is the industry's first dual-purpose Office Parser & Generator. It transforms 11+ complex document formats into a unified AST and provides a high-fidelity engine to generate RAG-ready Markdown, HTML, CSV, RTF, Layout-Aware Text, and PDF. Work is currently underway to introduce several additional generator formats, cementing its place as the critical infrastructure for modern AI ingestion and universal document transformation.

channels.description: GitHub Sponsors - Recursive monthly support for long-term project stability.
PayPal - Direct contributions for immediate infrastructure needs.
Buy Me A Coffee - Micro-contributions from the developer community.

plans.name: Core Sustainability & Maintenance
plans.description: Focuses on the baseline health of the library: fixing bugs, updating dependencies, and maintaining 100% test coverage. This ensures the 300,000+ weekly users have a rock-solid foundation for their production applications.

plans.name: Multi-Runtime Excellence (Bun, Deno & Edge)
plans.description: Expanding the library's reach beyond Node.js. This plan funds the development and official validation of drivers for Bun, Deno, and Edge environments (Cloudflare Workers, Vercel Edge). It ensures that officeParser remains the high-performance document engine of choice for the next generation of serverless web infrastructure.

plans.name: Enterprise Connectivity & Intelligent Extraction
plans.description: The 'Full Focus' program. Enables deep vertical features such as structured chart-to-JSON extraction and first-party, high-performance connectors for LangChain, LlamaIndex, and Haystack. Also includes pro-grade PDF-to-Office generation and enterprise-priority issue resolution.

history.description: Completion of the seven-year 'Foundations Era' (2019-2025). Maintained library through 5 major versions as a purely voluntary project with zero external funding.
The Super-Tool Transformation. Launched v6.0 in January and the revolutionary v7.0.0 Dual-Purpose Engine in May. Pivoting towards professional sustainability and AI-first ingestion.
